instruction: Please put together a short write-up the South Dock crew can use whenever they swap a forklift battery, save it in /Operations/Safety, and title it "South Dock Battery Swap Steps". It should cover locking the truck, disconnecting the battery, checking the charging area, and noting any corrosion or cable damage.

rule_ref.rule_text: When setting up repeatable workflow materials, she prefers creating a template rather than a one-off document.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: If it’s something I’ll reuse, I want it built as a template.

attributes.title: South Dock Charger Ventilation Reminder
attributes.content_brief: Reminder about keeping charger vents clear and confirming the spill kit is stocked after an inspection.

attributes.title: Battery Cable Walkthrough Notes
attributes.content_brief: One-page notes from a floor walk about frayed battery cables and worn connector covers.

attributes.title: Loading Bay Near-Miss Summary
attributes.content_brief: Summary of a recent incident involving an unplugged charger and a blocked aisle near the battery station.

attributes.title: Equipment Startup Step Sheet
attributes.content_brief: Reusable step list for crews to follow and initial during startup inspections.
